early_signals_summary.key_insight: Fear & Greed at 25 (EXTREME FEAR) with BTC up 1.17% - classic contrarian signal. Whale accumulation headlines suggest smart money positioning. HIMS divergence warrants monitoring for biotech rotation.
early_signals_summary.trade_setup: BTC showing early accumulation conditions - price rising while sentiment still fearful. Watch for fear index recovery above 30 for confirmation.
